concepts.title: Guardrail metrics and alert thresholds
concepts.hook: Detect performance degradation; avoid false alarms.

concepts.title: Seasonality and deseasonalization
concepts.hook: Remove seasonal patterns for cleaner signals; use deseasonalized metrics.

concepts.title: Anomaly detection
concepts.hook: Detect unusual behavior in metrics; statistical or algorithmic approaches.

concepts.title: Data validation and schema checks
concepts.hook: Catch upstream errors; prevent bad data flowing downstream.

concepts.title: Missing data and imputation
concepts.hook: MCAR, MAR, MNAR; listwise deletion vs imputation varies in bias.

concepts.title: Outlier detection
concepts.hook: Statistical (z-score, IQR) vs domain (business rule) approaches.

concepts.title: Data lineage and versioning
concepts.hook: Track how data flows; reproduce results.
